g.title: public.story_play_sessions:story_id->public.stories:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (story_id) REFERENCES stories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.story_play_sessions:start_setting_id->public.story_start_settings:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (start_setting_id) REFERENCES story_start_settings(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

g.title: public.story_messages:play_session_id->public.story_play_sessions:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (play_session_id) REFERENCES story_play_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.story_choices:play_session_id->public.story_play_sessions:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (play_session_id) REFERENCES story_play_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
